title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 26 November 2024.

items.title: New **Sonic the Hedgehog 3** trailer features beloved Chao Garden and Keanu's Shadow
**2K** has removed its launcher from all PC games
bullets: BioShock, Mafia and Civilization publisher 2K has officially shut down its PC games launcher and removed the platform from all of its games.
Additionally, the publisher has also removed the “2K Launcher Beta”, a completely separate launcher, from Sid Meier’s Civilization V.

items.title: IO pulls **Hitman** content featuring Conor McGregor following court ruling
bullets: McGregor was last week ordered to pay $260,000 in damages after a jury at a civil trial at Ireland’s high court found that he’d assaulted Nikita Hand, who had accused him of raping her.
Hitman World of Assassination’s limited-time Elusive Target mission The Disruptor, which features the likeness and voiceover work of McGregor, was released this summer and returned again this month.

bullets.text: The mission, which was due to be available from November 15 until December 8, was also included as part of the free Hitman World of Assassination starter pack.
